items.name: Die of Death: Stylized Artful - Head

"This is a Concept Skin for Die of Death made by the Our New Group! UGC team."

Die of Death By @Saucefy10
Plushieful Made By: The official Our New Group UGC Team.

UGC Texture & Concept By: @Ralxemaniac

[DISCLAIMER: THIS UGC IS FANMADE, MEANING IT IS NOT OFFICIAL.]

Buy The Full "Stylized" Set Here: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=Stylized+Artful&Category=1&CreatorName=Our+new+group%21&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1

This model and texture is made from scratch, if it is stolen then there will be a DMCA involved.
